title: schizachyrium scabriflorum
intro: Schizachyrium scabriflorum, also known as little bluestem, is a perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Schizachyrium scabriflorum typically include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
